data.title: Greenland Energy (NASDAQ: GLND) Appoints Joe Moglia, former TD Ameritrade CEO and Chairman, as Executive Advisor to the Board
data.description: Experienced financial and strategic expert joins Greenland Energy to provide guidance on Arctic development plans. With extensive experience in capital markets and global economics, the new advisory member is set to enhance the Company's operations. The announcement was made on March 26, 2026 in Houston. Greenland Energy, a leading player in the industry, is focused on its growth trajectory with the expertise of its newest team member.

data.title: Founder of venture firm offers reward to retrieve $42 million in stolen Bitcoin, crypto; bounty announced for assistance.
data.description: Bo Shen, a member of Fenbushi Capital, has announced a reward for individuals who assist in retrieving a portion of the $42 million that was stolen in the year 2022.

data.title: Steel City Hoops Shines the Spotlight on PA Basketball Great Mike Iuzzolino
data.description: Coach Mike Iuzzolino, a former NBA player and championship-winning coach, known as a legend at St. Francis, was recently honored in his hometown of Pittsburgh on March 26, 2026. His jersey was retired by his alma mater and he led his team to a PIAA championship. Iuzzolino's successful career and local basketball legacy have solidified his status as a notable figure in the sports community.

data.title: GetHealthy Launches Script, an AI-Enabled Platform Expanding Practitioner Commerce Beyond Supplements Across Seven Product Categories
data.description: GetHealthy, an infrastructure platform based in Austin, Texas, has introduced a new product called GetHealthy Script. This AI-enabled clinical scripting platform is aimed at assisting practitioners in providing comprehensive health protocols beyond just supplements. Unlike traditional dispensaries that restrict practitioners to recommending supplements from a single category, GetHealthy Script allows for multi-category protocols, including doctor-grade supplements, nutrition, and clean home products. This platform aims to enhance the overall health recommendations offered by practitioners.

data.title: MV Transportation Team Members Earn National Recognition in 2026 Lytx Coach and Driver of the Year Awards
data.description: In Dallas on March 26, 2026, MV Transportation revealed that two employees from their San Antonio, TX branch were honored in the 2026 Lytx Coach and Driver of the Year Awards. This recognition highlights their dedication to safety and leadership.

data.title: DaBella Celebrates Opening Day With Major League Baseball Partnerships Across Three Markets
data.description: A major home improvement company has joined forces with three baseball teams, the Colorado Rockies, Minnesota Twins, and Texas Rangers, for the upcoming 2026 season. With the baseball season kicking off on Opening Day, DaBella revealed its partnerships in Austin, Texas. This collaboration signifies a significant move by DaBella in connecting with sports enthusiasts across the country. The partnerships promise exciting opportunities for all involved parties.

data.title: MNG Missouri Holdings Responds to Missouri Attorney General Cease and Desist Letter
data.description: On March 17, 2026, MNG Missouri Holdings, LLC, operating as CBD Kratom, was served with a cease and desist letter by the Missouri Attorney General's Office in regards to its CBD Kratom Tower Grove establishment in St. Louis. The letter claims that specific products sold at the location surpass certain regulations.

data.title: FRC's Tony Perkins Statement on Finnish Parliamentarian Päivi Räsänen's Guilty Verdict
data.description: On March 26, 2026, the Finnish Supreme Court reached a decision with a close 3-2 vote, ruling parliamentarian Päivi Räsänen and Bishop Juhana Pohjola guilty of advocating "hate speech" for their support of traditional marriage outlined in a pamphlet written by Räsänen 20 years ago.

data.title: Freebirds Unleashes the Toasted Bacon Chicken Ranch Burrito
data.description: In Dallas, Freebirds World Burrito has launched a new limited-time offering, the Toasted Bacon Chicken Ranch Burrito, available at all locations. This burrito is a unique blend of juicy fajita chicken, melted cheese, crispy bacon, and Freebirds Ranch sauce, all wrapped tightly and toasted for a flavorful experience. This creation aims to impress with its bold flavors and is sure to be a hit with customers seeking a delicious meal. Get ready to experience a full-on flavor flex with the Toasted Bacon Chicken Ranch Burrito from Freebirds World Burrito.

data.title: Over 98% of crypto owners globally don't declare taxes, new report finds
data.description: The Global Cryptocurrency Taxation Report 2026 by Divly indicates that a mere 1.76% of cryptocurrency holders report their holdings for tax obligations. This statistic is derived from official data from various countries and projected global figures in anticipation of upcoming significant reporting changes. Released from Stockholm on March 26, 2026, Divly, a renowned crypto tax calculator, provided these insights.

data.title: MASSAGE ENVY BUILDS ON 2025 MOMENTUM AHEAD OF ANNUAL PERFORMANCE SUMMIT
data.description: Ahead of a gathering of franchisees from all over the country, Massage Envy is showcasing advancements in skin and body care, digital interaction, and commitment to fostering the future workforce in SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. The company is set to convene this event on March 26, 2026. Massage Envy, a prominent player in the skincare industry, is emphasizing innovation in various aspects as it gears up for this national meeting.

data.title: Biltmore Debuts Luminere, a New Evening Sensory Experience of Light, Imagery, and Sound
data.description: Asheville, North Carolina - Biltmore has introduced Luminere, a captivating outdoor nighttime event that enhances the estate's picturesque grounds with light, visuals, and music. data.title: New director Brian Zeve appointed by Wilson & Company. Exciting news for the team!
data.description: According to recent reports, a total of 25 individuals were injured in a car accident that occurred on the highway early this morning. The incident involved three vehicles and resulted in seven people being seriously injured, while the rest suffered minor injuries. Emergency services responded promptly, transporting all injured individuals to nearby hospitals for treatment. Authorities are currently investigating the cause of the accident.
